apps.title: Hermes Kanban Board
apps.summary: A web-accessible, read-only Hermes Kanban operator board with a constrained /api/kanban bridge, live default board data, and explicit task-safety boundaries.
safetyPosture: No direct Hermes dashboard plugin exposure
operatorChecklist: Open the board and confirm the banner says live/read-only.
Verify six columns render: triage, todo, ready, running, blocked, done.
Confirm create/dispatch/ready-promotion controls are not active.
Use the app-preview surface, not game-preview, for operator use.
nextIdeas: Add Authentik-protected triage card creation after workflow approval.
Add enrichment-only triage helpers: labels, summaries, dedupe hints, missing-field hints.
Add an operator app registry as more app-preview tools arrive.
